body:
Hi there,

I was looking at Affordable Accounting, LLC's website and noticed a few things that are probably costing you customers:

Your website was built before 2020 and it shows. Old code means slow load times, security vulnerabilities, and compatibility issues with modern browsers. Visitors expect fast, smooth experiences — if your site takes more than 3 seconds to load, you've already lost them.

You have no analytics on your website, which means you have no idea how many people visit, where they come from, or why they leave. Without data, you're making business decisions blind. Setting up analytics takes minutes and gives you insights that directly drive more customers.

Your website has no live chat or instant support option. When a potential customer has a question and can't get an answer immediately, they move on to a competitor who responds faster. Live chat can increase conversions by up to 48%.

Your website has no blog, which means you're missing the #1 way to drive free traffic from Google. Businesses that blog get 55% more website visitors. Each article you publish is a new chance to show up when potential customers search for your services.

Your website has no testimonials or reviews displayed. 72% of customers read reviews before choosing a local business — if they can't see social proof on your site, they go to a competitor who showcases their happy customers. Adding even 3-5 testimonials can dramatically increase trust and inquiries.

We're NanoSoft — we help local service businesses fix these exact problems.

Here's what we can do for Affordable Accounting, LLC:
• Modern, mobile-friendly website design
• Fast loading, secure (HTTPS), and Google-optimized
• Built-in booking/contact system so you never miss a lead
• Analytics setup so you can see what's working

No contracts. No fluff. Just results.

Want me to put together a free mockup for Affordable Accounting, LLC? No obligation.

Best,
